assertions.title: The shipped TUI launcher refuses to run before a company exists
assertions.reason: The PTY-launched shipped TUI entrypoint failed fast on the zero-company instance and printed a clear create-a-company-first refusal instead of opening the console.

steps.action: Confirm the isolated precompany instance at http://127.0.0.1:3101 has zero companies
steps.expected: The instance remains empty before TUI launch

steps.action: Launch the shipped orchestrator TUI entrypoint through a PTY with `pnpm dev:tui -- --url http://127.0.0.1:3101`
steps.expected: The launcher fails fast with a clear create-a-company-first message instead of opening a broken console
steps.observed: The PTY printed `[paperclip] No companies found. Create a company first, then launch the orchestrator TUI.` and exited with code 1.

steps.action: Capture terminal evidence from the PTY session
steps.expected: Transcript/snapshot clearly show the launcher command and refusal message
steps.observed: Saved transcript text, trimmed snapshot, and PNG screenshot showing the exact command and refusal message.

summary: Tested 1 assertion on the isolated precompany TUI surface: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The shipped launcher refused to start against the zero-company instance and showed a clear create-a-company-first message rather than opening a broken console.
